ab: Namahkulung kaku aci ama nu maku a milisu’ ci ama ci Kacaw i nacila.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔Kacaw。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Madukaay ku kuku’ ni ama ni Kacaw.
Mavuhang ku vadahung nu luma’ saan cira i tamiyan.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Matevaday cira namakayra i vadahung, namisanga’ tu vadahung saan.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Siniawit ci ama tu titi nu rarapa atu icep, u sapaveli i ci ama ci Kacaw.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給Kacaw叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Natayra i luma’ ni ama ni Kacaw kaku i nacila, adihay ku nipakungku nira.
ch: 我昨天去Kacaw叔叔家聊天時 ，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Kaw rarutu kaku, suwal satu ci ama ci Kacaw itakuwan, mavatac tu kisu, tanestes tu kisu saan.
ch: 我要離開前，Kacaw叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Anu kapah tu ku kuku’ nu misu, tayni han tu i luma’ a mihulul han aku ci ama ci Kacaw.
ch: 於是我說：「等Kacaw叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
